service.name: Google Gemini API
service.description_for_ai: Google Gemini AI models. Most generous free tier of any frontier AI API. Gemini 2.5 Flash is fast and cheap, Gemini 3.1 Pro is the flagship. Supports text, vision, audio, video, and code. 1M+ token context window. Use when cost matters or for multimodal tasks involving video/audio.

auth.how_to_get: Get key instantly at https://aistudio.google.com/app/apikey — free
auth.cost: Free tier: 1500 req/day for Gemini 2.5 Flash. Paid: $0.30/$2.50 per 1M tokens for 2.5 Flash

capabilities.description_for_ai: Generate text, analyze images/video/audio, answer questions, write code. Gemini 2.0 Flash is default — fast, free 1500 req/day. Use gemini-2.5-pro for complex reasoning with 1M context window.

model.description: gemini-2.5-flash (fast, free 1500/day), gemini-2.5-pro (best quality, 1M context), gemini-2.0-flash-exp (experimental)

contents.description: Conversation: [{role: 'user'|'model', parts: [{text: 'message'}]}]. For images add: {inline_data: {mime_type: 'image/jpeg', data: 'BASE64'}}

systemInstruction.description: {parts: [{text: 'system prompt'}]} — sets model behavior and persona

tools.description: [{functionDeclarations: [{name, description, parameters: {type: object, properties: {}}}]}] for function calling

safetySettings.description: [{category: HARM_CATEGORY_HARASSMENT, threshold: BLOCK_NONE}] — configure content safety

capabilities.description_for_ai: Create text embeddings using Gemini Embedding model. For semantic search and RAG.
Count tokens in content before sending to estimate cost and check context limits.

model.description: AI/ML model identifier to use for this request

agent_hints.free_tier: gemini-2.5-flash: 1500 requests/day FREE. Best free frontier model in 2026.
agent_hints.multimodal: Pass images, audio, video inline. gemini-2.5-pro handles 1M token context with full video/audio understanding.
agent_hints.context: 1M token context = entire codebases, long books, hours of audio. No chunking needed.
agent_hints.thinking: gemini-2.5-flash-thinking-exp supports extended reasoning for hard problems.
